clinical_validity.rationale: The final plan preserves clinical objectives, nurse/family actors, urgent escalation, documentation, and debrief value.

psychometric_defensibility.rationale: Trace-supported review, claim limits, and future evidence gates are explicit.

technical_feasibility.rationale: Milestones isolate deterministic core work from optional local AI, voice, XR, asset, and MongoDB complexity.

architecture_coherence.rationale: The first commit series gives coherent package, app, adapter, and verification boundaries.

security_privacy.rationale: Local-only defaults, mock providers, audit records, and no real patient data remain central.

ux_workflow_fit.rationale: Admin review, faculty packet, learner fallback, and XR shell expectations are aligned to first-user workflows.

cost_performance_efficiency.rationale: Cloud charges, paid APIs, model downloads, and heavyweight asset tools are deferred behind gates.

open_source_sustainability.rationale: License intake, provenance, and optional dependency controls improve open-source durability.

market_gtm_strength.rationale: The demo path is credible for design partners, though sales proof remains future work.

evidence_discipline.rationale: Every maturity claim is tied to scorecards, verification commands, source records, or explicit evidence debt.

implementation_readiness.rationale: The plan now includes milestones, commit order, worker ownership, tests, hard stops, and optional runtime gates.

adversarial_robustness.rationale: The final revision absorbs red-team attacks on scope, claims, dependencies, local models, voice, assets, and UI theater.

legal_regulatory_resilience.rationale: Non-goals, claim language, synthetic voice controls, and license gates are now embedded in the build plan.

specialty_clinical_generalizability.rationale: The ED station is narrow but the scenario, trace, actor, and review primitives are designed for later specialty cases.

critical_risks.summary: The first implementation can still drift if optional local AI or asset work begins before the deterministic station core passes.
Psychometric and clinical validity evidence remain future research and cannot be inferred from the prototype.

evidence_debt.summary: Run clean install, tests, and browser checks after the actual application monorepo is created.
Run Quest 3 and target Apple Silicon model/voice benchmarks before enabling immersive or local AI claims.

decision_debt.summary: Choose exact pinned versions during package creation after license and compatibility checks.

summary: Iteration 0007 locks the code-phase handoff with milestones, hard stops, commit sequencing, and evidence gates suitable for starting a deterministic local-first implementation.
